    battlefieldController - Class in Unnamed Package

    Board - Class in environment
    Handles the visual rendering of the isometric game grid using JavaFX.

    C

    canAttack() - Method in class entities.Archer
    Determines what tiles a unit can attack based on its attack range.
    canAttack() - Method in class entities.Cavalry
    Determines what tiles a unit can attack based on its attack range.
    canAttack() - Method in class entities.Infantry
    Determines what tiles a unit can attack based on its attack range.
    canAttack() - Method in class entities.Pikeman
    Determines what tiles a unit can attack based on its attack range.
    canAttack() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Returns a boolean[][] (board-sized) where true means this unit can attack that tile.
    canAttackTile(int, int) - Method in class entities.Unit
     
    canMoveTo() - Method in class entities.Archer
    Determines what tiles a unit can move to based on its movement range.
    canMoveTo() - Method in class entities.Cavalry
    Determines what tiles a unit can move to based on its movement range.
    canMoveTo() - Method in class entities.Infantry
    Determines what tiles a unit can move to based on its movement range.
    canMoveTo() - Method in class entities.Pikeman
    Determines what tiles a unit can move to based on its movement range.
    canMoveTo() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Returns a boolean[][] (board-sized) where true means this unit can move to that tile.
    canMoveToTile(int, int) - Method in class entities.Unit
     
    canvasToTile(double, double) - Method in class environment.Board
    Converts the absolute world coordinates to the coordinates on the board grid.
    Cavalry - Class in entities
     
    Cavalry(int, int, String, int, int) - Constructor for class entities.Cavalry
     
    clearSelection() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Clears the current unit selection.

    D

    DatabaseIO - Class in utils
     
    DatabaseIO() - Constructor for class utils.DatabaseIO
     
    Debug - Class in utils
    Custom logging utility to handle debug output.
    Debug() - Constructor for class utils.Debug
     
    disable() - Static method in class utils.Debug
     
    drawUnit(GraphicsContext, Unit) - Method in class environment.Board
    Draws a unit on top of the tile, handling sprite alignment based on the tile's top vertex and the unit sprite's dimensions.

    E

    enable() - Static method in class utils.Debug
     
    endTurn() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Ends the active player's turn, resets their units' movement, and advances to the next player.
    endTurn() - Method in class core.Player
     
    endTurn() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Resets currentMovement to maxMovement at the start of the next turn.
    entities - package entities
     
    environment - package environment
     
    environment.tile - package environment.tile
     
    error(Exception) - Static method in class utils.Debug

    G

    GameManager - Class in core
    Global tracker for the current state of the game.
    GameManager() - Constructor for class core.GameManager
     
    getActivePlayer() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns the Player object for the player whose turn it currently is.
    getActivePlayerID() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns the ID of the player whose turn it currently is.
    getBattlefieldDifficulty() - Static method in class ui.MenuSelections
     
    getBoard() - Static method in class environment.Board
    Returns the current board
    getBoardCosts() - Static method in class environment.Board
     
    getBoardTile(int, int) - Static method in class environment.Board
    Returns the tile at a given coordinate on the current board
    getCost() - Method in class environment.tile.Tile
     
    getHealth() - Method in class entities.Unit
     
    getImage() - Method in class entities.Unit
     
    getImage(int, int) - Method in class environment.tile.Tile
    Returns the appropriate sprite image for a specific board coordinate.
    getKingdom() - Method in class core.Player
     
    getPlayerID() - Method in class entities.Unit
     
    getPlayerOfUnit(Unit) - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns the player ID for a given unit as an int.
    getPlayerOneEmpire() - Static method in class ui.MenuSelections
     
    getPlayerTwoEmpire() - Static method in class ui.MenuSelections
     
    getPos() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Returns the unit's current grid position as {row, col}.
    getPositionOfUnit(Unit) - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Searches every tile on the board to find where the given unit is located.
    getScene() - Method in class environment.Board
    Initializes the canvas, sets up input listeners for mouse and keyboard, and returns the constructed scene.
    getSelectedUnit() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns the currently selected unit, or null if nothing is selected.
    getSpritePath() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Retrieves the dynamic path for this unit's sprite based on their owning player's kingdom.
    getTurnCount() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns the current turn count.
    getUnitAtTile(int, int) - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns the unit occupying a given tile, or null if the tile is empty.
    getUnitAtTile(int, int) - Static method in class environment.Board
     
    getUnitID() - Method in class entities.Unit
     
    getUnits(int, int) - Method in class core.Player
     
    getUnitsBoard() - Static method in class environment.Board
     
    getUnitsForKingdom(String, int, int[]) - Static method in class entities.Kingdoms
    Returns an array of Units corresponding to the specified kingdom, player ID, and center starting position.
    getValue(String, String) - Method in class utils.DatabaseIO
     
    getX() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Returns the row (x) coordinate of the unit.
    getY() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Returns the column (y) coordinate of the unit.

    health - Variable in class entities.Unit
     

    I

    Infantry - Class in entities
     
    Infantry(int, int, String, int, int) - Constructor for class entities.Infantry
     
    isAllyAtTile(int, int, Unit) - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns true if an allied unit (a unit belonging to the same player as unit) occupies the given tile.
    isEnabled() - Static method in class utils.Debug
     
    isEnemyAtTile(int, int, Unit) - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns true if an enemy unit (a unit belonging to a different player than unit) occupies the given tile.
    isSetupTurn() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns true if the game is still in the setup phase, where players are placing their initial units.
    isTileBlocked(int, int) - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Returns true if any unit (ally or enemy) occupies the given tile.

    ScreenFlows - Class in ui
    Same screen IDs as main.Main#setScreen(int), for use from FXML controllers without changing Main.

    setDebug(boolean) - Static method in class utils.Debug
     
    setDebug(boolean, int) - Static method in class utils.Debug
    Enables or disables debugging and sets the minimum priority level.
    setDebugPriority(int) - Static method in class utils.Debug
     
    setPlayerOneEmpire(String) - Static method in class ui.MenuSelections
     
    setPlayerTwoEmpire(String) - Static method in class ui.MenuSelections
     
    setScreen(int) - Method in class main.Main
    Swaps out the current view scene in the main window.
    setSelectedUnit(Unit) - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Sets the unit that the active player has selected.
    show(Stage, int) - Static method in class ui.ScreenFlows
     
    spaceClearAroundTile(int, int) - Static method in class environment.Board
    Returns true if there are no units on the 8 tiles surrounding the given tile coordinates.
    spendAllMovement() - Method in class entities.Unit
    Spends all remaining movement points (called after the unit moves).
    stage(ActionEvent) - Static method in class ui.FxStages
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class main.Main
     
    startGame() - Static method in class core.GameManager
    Initialises turn tracking and determines the first active player.

    Tile - Class in environment.tile
    Represents a single tile on the game board.

    Returns the topmost point of a tile, used for positioning tile sprites in the grid
